subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which emperor belonged to the Maurya Empire?
question_hi: मौर्य सम्राट किस सम्राट के लिए है।
explanation_en: Ashoka Maurya was an emperor who belonged to the Maurya Empire. He is also known as King Ashoka and ruled during the 3rd century BC.
